---
name: New Scanner Request
about: Suggest a macOS persistence mechanism that LaunchAudit doesn't cover yet
title: "[Scanner] "
labels: scanner, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Persistence Mechanism

Name of the persistence mechanism (e.g., "Endpoint Security Event Tap").

## Description

How does this persistence mechanism work? What does it allow software to do?

## Locations / Paths

Where on disk are the relevant files or configurations stored?

```
/path/to/relevant/directory
```

## Detection Method

How can this mechanism be detected? (e.g., file enumeration, system API, database query)

## Risk Considerations

What makes this mechanism potentially risky? (e.g., runs as root, survives reboot, common malware vector)

## References

- Link to Apple documentation
- Link to security research
- Any relevant CVEs or write-ups

## macOS Version

Which macOS versions support this mechanism?
